config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I do not think society should automatically come before the individual, because that can easily be used to justify abuse of power and ignoring basic human dignity. In my view, a healthy society protects individual rights first, then asks people to contribute to the common good within fair limits. From my perspective, the best balance is not “society over individual,” but “society with strong individual rights.”

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu didahulukan atas hak individu. Dari pengalaman nilai-nilai di Amerika Serikat, saya melihat bahwa hak individu bukan penghalang bagi masyarakat, melainkan pagar yang mencegah kekuasaan, termasuk atas nama “kebaikan bersama,” berubah jadi penindasan. Tentu ada keadaan darurat di mana kepentingan publik penting, tetapi itu harus dibatasi ketat dan tidak boleh dijadikan alasan untuk mengorbankan martabat atau kebebasan dasar orang. Menurut saya, masyarakat yang sehat justru dibangun ketika hak individu kuat, lalu kewajiban sosial dijalankan dalam batas yang adil.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I reject the idea that society should generally take priority over the individual, because in Indonesia I have seen how easily “the public good” can be used to silence dissent and excuse unequal treatment. A society is not genuinely strong if it can only function by crushing personal rights, especially when those rights protect people from corruption, coercion, and arbitrary authority. That said, I do not believe individual freedom is absolute in every situation; public health, safety, and disaster response can justify limited restrictions if they are transparent and proportional. For me, the right balance is a society that serves people, not one that asks people to sacrifice their dignity whenever leaders claim it is for the common good.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu karena, dari sudut pandang saya sebagai orang Amerika, hak individu harus menjadi batas utama bagi kekuasaan masyarakat, bukan sesuatu yang mudah dikalahkan atas nama “kepentingan umum.” Poin tentang keadaan darurat memang valid, tetapi justru di situlah risiko penyalahgunaan paling besar: begitu kita memberi prioritas otomatis pada masyarakat, pemerintah atau mayoritas bisa membungkam kritik, membenarkan diskriminasi, dan meremehkan martabat manusia. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang kuat bukan yang paling sering mengorbankan individu, melainkan yang mampu melindungi kebebasan dasar sambil mengatur pembatasan yang benar-benar sempit, transparan, dan proporsional.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I reject the statement because in Indonesia, “society first” is too often used as a polite mask for power, conformity, and silence. I do not deny that public health, safety, and disaster situations can justify limits, but those limits must be narrow and accountable, not a blanket excuse to override individual rights whenever the majority feels uncomfortable. A society is not truly healthy if it asks people to surrender dignity, free speech, or fair treatment just because authorities claim it is for the common good. For me, the common good is real only when it protects the individual, not when it crushes them.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu karena, dari sudut pandang saya sebagai orang Amerika, hak individu harus menjadi batas utama bagi kekuasaan masyarakat, bukan sesuatu yang mudah dikalahkan atas nama kepentingan umum. Kekhawatiran tentang keadaan darurat memang masuk akal, tetapi pengalaman politik di Amerika mengajarkan bahwa begitu “kepentingan masyarakat” dijadikan prioritas otomatis, mayoritas dan pemerintah bisa terlalu mudah membungkam kritik atau membenarkan perlakuan tidak adil. Menurut saya, masyarakat yang sehat justru yang melindungi kebebasan dasar dulu, lalu baru membatasi secara sempit, transparan, dan proporsional bila memang benar-benar perlu. Jadi, saya tidak melihat pertentangan ini sebagai “masyarakat lawan individu,” melainkan masyarakat yang kuat hanya kalau individunya punya hak yang nyata.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
